description_long: This induction cooker features a rectangular, box-like form with a predominantly white body and a black base. The cooktop has two circular burners, each surrounded by black metal grates, with visible signs of use such as discoloration and stains around the burners. On the front face, there are two round, dark-colored control knobs positioned symmetrically beneath each burner. The surface is flat and bordered by a slightly raised edge, likely to contain spills. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible digital display or branding, and the control panel is limited to the two knobs. The cooker appears compact and portable, suitable for countertop or outdoor urban use.
description: A compact, rectangular induction cooker with two burners, black metal grates, and two front control knobs on a white and black body.
description_view_0: Front view showing both burners, metal grates, and the two control knobs clearly visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cooker and the alignment of the burners and grates, with no controls visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the cooker, both burners, and the absence of any controls or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the depth and burner arrangement, with no controls visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel consists of two round knobs located on the front face, each aligned below a burner. There are no visible buttons, touch areas, labels, icons, or indicator lights.
